tool_args.hypothesis: transferFrom misses or bypasses allowance checks allowing any caller to move tokens from arbitrary accounts (unauthorized transfer).

steps.tool_result: {"ok": true, "target_function": "transferFrom", "hypothesis": "transferFrom misses or bypasses allowance checks allowing any caller to move tokens from arbitrary accounts (unauthorized transfer)."}

tool_args.exploit_logic: Call transferFrom(sender, recipient, amount) from an attacker account without prior approval or allowance set; if transfer succeeds and balances change, the function lacks proper allowance checks. The test will deploy the original token, mint tokens to 'victim', and then have 'attacker' call transferFrom(victim, attacker, amount) expecting success if vulnerable.

tool_args.evidence: forge test passed: attacker called transferFrom(victim, attacker, amount) without allowance and successfully transferred victim's balance to attacker. Passing run: 'forge test' executed the generated PoC which asserts victim balance decreased and attacker balance increased, demonstrating missing allowance checks in transferFrom.
